column1: Authorize & Capture - We will instantly settle the transaction within the checkout.
column2: Authorize & Capture - We will instantly settle the transaction within the checkout.

column1: Authorize - Will only auth the payment and store a token, the transaction will not be settled.
column2: Authorize - Will only auth the payment and store a token, the transaction will not be settled.

column1: Future Payments - Allows us to save the customers PayPal account for later purchases and use with the Vault
column2: Future Payments - Allows us to save the customers PayPal account for later purchases and use with the Vault

column1: Single Payment - Will only require the customer to sign in, we will only be able to take a single payment
column2: Single Payment - Will only require the customer to sign in, we will only be able to take a single payment
